description: Tracks which versions of each Node are compatible with each other. Updated when a Node ships a new major or minor version.

matrix.notes: Root of the dependency tree. v0.7.0 carries canonical WellKnownNodes, typed TenantId, and current Grid/Operation context contracts.
Consumes HoneyDrunk.Kernel.Abstractions only for Grid context and telemetry; full Kernel runtime dependency removed.
Aligned to current Kernel packages; cancellation and provider facade behavior stabilized.
Validation-only Auth boundary preserved; consumes Kernel/Vault contracts for request validation and signing-key access.
Requires live Kernel request context at DI registration and execution; Kernel operation correlation is authoritative.
Outbox enrichment requires current operation context or explicit non-empty CorrelationId and TenantId.
No published package yet; timer work now establishes Kernel Grid/Operation context and shared placeholder rotators.
Uses Kernel canonical Notify identity fallback while preserving deploy-time overrides; queue credentials resolve through Vault-backed secret boundary.
Collector uses Kernel canonical Pulse identity fallback while preserving HONEYDRUNK_NODE_ID; Loki/Mimir/Tempo share linked internal HTTP OTLP sink helpers.
Consumes HoneyDrunk.Kernel.Abstractions only; full Kernel runtime dependency removed. Delivery remains delegated through HoneyDrunk.Notify.Abstractions.
Seed Node. Compatibility will be tightened when Observe Abstractions and the first connector package ship.

upgradeRules.majorBump: All downstream Nodes must verify compatibility and may require code changes. Create a dispatch plan.
upgradeRules.minorBump: Downstream Nodes should update but no breaking changes expected. Verify canary tests pass.
upgradeRules.patchBump: No downstream action needed. Bug fixes and internal changes only.
